_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-700001: Legitimate PIM-Activation durch autorisierten Admin
scenario: Authorized Identity Admin activates Global Administrator via PIM for maintenance window
why_fp: PIM activation event present within 60 seconds before the role assignment
Same user activated and was assigned (self-activation pattern)
User is a known Identity Administrator (tracked in CMDB)
tuning_recommendation: Exclude assignments within 60s of a preceding PIM activation for the same user+role combination
